name: Vulcax
description: Charges up a powerful blast of ultra-heated plasma.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Charges up a powerful blast of ultra-heated plasma.

components.name: Goblite Tears
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Smokefinger in Fortuna on Venus.

components.name: Kriller Thermal Laser
components.description:
A weapon that discharges lasers over short distances.

Source: Dismantled from Kriller servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Kriller in the Orb Vallis lake during Warm weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.

components.name: Marquise Veridos
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Old Man Suumbaat in Cetus on Earth.

components.name: Tromyzon Entroplasma
components.description:
A solvent that reconstitutes waste product from the Weeping Towers into degenerated matter.

Source: Dismantled from Tromyzon servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Tromyzon in Orb Vallis Pond Hotspots during Cold weather. Also drops from the Exploiter Orb in the Orb Vallis.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the incorrect Foundry rush costs for Cryotra, Tazicor, and Vulcax weapons.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some sounds for the Vulcax.
